config._comment: 3-state regime: Bull (IOZ>50MA & breadth>50%)=1.0x, Neutral=0.75x, Bear (IOZ<50MA & breadth<40%)=0.5x position scale

failure_modes: Over-restrictive thresholds: Bull requires BOTH IOZ>50MA AND breadth>50% simultaneously. ASX rarely meets both conditions.
Scale-to-binary-cutoff: 0.5x/0.75x risk_budget produces position_value < $500 min, completely dropping trades instead of scaling them.
Best trades in neutral markets: Strongest momentum signals occur in mixed-breadth environments (neutral), which are penalised by 0.75x scale.
Root cause: Thresholds calibrated for US markets with more persistent bull phases. ASX market structure is different.
analysis.conclusion: Regime filter removes 46% of trades but reduces CAGR by 5.19pp and Sharpe by 0.593. System performs best in neutral/mixed market conditions which this filter penalises. Regime data is injected as INFO-ONLY features in signal.features for future ML meta-labeler (Phase 5).
analysis.next_action: Disabled. Regime info preserved in signal features. Proceed to Phase 3 Item 3: Volume Spike Confirmation for Mean Reversion.
